title: Criminal History Records - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Criminal History Records 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH COURT INFORMATION FINDER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Maintains a website with information on Oregon's county circuit courts, tax court, and Court of Appeals. Does not maintain information on municipal, justice, federal, or tribal courts. Criminal records may be accessed through county circuit courts. 1163 State Street Salem, OR 973012563 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 986-5500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD CHECKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides public access to Oregon criminal history record information. Individuals may request copies of their personal records from the state of Oregon or the FBI or copies of another individual's Oregon record (also known as an open record). Fingerprinting services are offered at the Salem office only. 3565 Trelstad Avenue SE Salem, OR 97317 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-3070 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON JUDICIAL BRANCH COURT INFORMATION FINDER OREGON STATE POLICE HEADQUARTERS CRIMINAL HISTORY RECORD CHECKS
